MINI MINUTES: Appearance: Appearing through CourtCall Atty. GianDominic Vitiello (310-943-9587) appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party Pilade Corsi. Atty. Britt Roberts (415-659-4873) appearing for Defendant and moving party Bank of America.

ARGUED. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:
DEFENDANTS BANK OF AMERICA, AND THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON FKA THE BANK OF NEW YORK'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS taken under submission. Off Calendar Feb-25-2015 Continued To Mar-25-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANTS BANK OF AMERICA, N.A., THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON FKA THE BANK OF NEW's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is continued to March 25, 2015. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C and provide courtesy copy of the operative complaint to Department 501 no later than March 2, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of opposition to Department 501 no later than March 2, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. MINI MINUTES:
Judge: Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Via Court Call: Giandominic Vitiello, Esq. of Katchko, Vitiello & Karikomi PC (310-943-9587), counsel for plaintiff/moving party
No appearance by defendants

The Court Adopts the Tentative ruling with modification as follows:

Hearing Of Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction And Temporary Restraining Order is OFF CALENDAR per oral stipulation of the parties and representation by plaintiff counsel. TRO is dissolved. Bond may be returned. Plaintiff counsel shall submit written stipulation and proposed written order accordingly and in compliance with CRC 3.1312.
